context_of_use: Deterministic synthetic engineering QA for ECG R-peak, T-offset, QT and heart-rate-corrected QT implementations.

truth_policy.qt_definition: Construction QRS onset to construction T offset.
truth_policy.qtc_definition: Scenario-declared formula applied by the cardiac timing model; formula identity is part of measurement identity.
truth_policy.first_beat: QT is scoreable; RR-dependent QTc is excluded until a preceding in-record R peak exists.
truth_policy.fiducial_limit: Model-defined endpoints do not represent human-reader uncertainty.

evidence_boundary: Synthetic engineering evidence only; not an FDA-qualified MDDT, clinical validation, diagnostic performance evidence, or a substitute for sponsor-specific protocol, risk analysis and representative clinical data.
